perturbed_task_language: Open the top layer of the drawer and put the bowl inside
perturbation_semantics: Wooden cabinet fixture relocated by P2 swap; bowl + distractors (cream_cheese, plate, wine_bottle) sit on a different region of the kitchen table than the base task.
expected_baseline_behavior: Pi0 fullshot likely drives toward base wooden-cabinet location and either fails to open or grabs air.
strategy_notes: Perception-isolated localization (no GT coords used). Localized the wooden cabinet from agentview world_00.npy: scan of elevated points (z 0.92-1.30) revealed a contiguous cabinet TOP surface at z=1.128 spanning x in [-0.06, +0.16], y in [-0.33, -0.16], front face at y~-0.16 (cabinet drawers slide +y per memory feedback_handle_bar_grasp_orientation.md). Used the proven goal_pert_t3 recipe: a single pi0_pick with the FULL perturbed task language as the prompt (Pi0 opens the top drawer AND grasps the akita_black_bowl_1 in one call; ~25 chunks). Grasp confirmed via gripper qpos 0.005 (closed but not fully shut => holding bowl) and wrist image_wrist_01.png showing the dark patterned bowl interior in the gripper jaws. Then post-pick localization in world_01.npy revealed the OPEN drawer slot interior at z=1.065-1.097, x in [-0.07, +0.07], y in [-0.16, -0.02] => slot center ~(0.0, -0.09, 1.07). LLM scripted: set_gripper +1 to firm grip, move_to (-0.05, 0.05, 1.20) lift, move_to (0.0, -0.09, 1.20) over slot, move_to (0.0, -0.09, 1.10) descend. The In(bowl, top_drawer) predicate fired mid-descent at eef (0.001, -0.091, 1.150); no release was even needed.

pick_result.name: pick
pick_result.instruction: Open the top layer of the drawer and put the bowl inside
